title: Big4Bot Output Envelope Base
description: A baseline structural envelope that all framework outputs should inherit to ensure metadata consistency.

skill_id.description: The explicit ID of the framework executed.

confidence_score.description: Agent's self-assessed confidence based on the quality of inputs provided.

missing_inputs.description: Any requested parameters from the input_schema that were omitted or inferred.

framework_payload.description: The bespoke analytical output specific to the SKILL.md methodology.
